description_long: This is a low-top, lace-up sneaker with a classic silhouette, featuring a rounded toe and a flat, slightly textured sole. The upper appears to be made of dark canvas or fabric material, with visible white stitching outlining the panels and eyelets. The shoe has white laces threaded through metal eyelets, and a white rubber midsole with a thin black stripe running along its edge. The toe cap and the area around the laces show some creasing and signs of wear, indicating regular use. The overall design is simple and utilitarian, suitable for casual urban environments. No visible branding or logos are present on the exterior surfaces.
description: A dark canvas lace-up sneaker with white laces, white stitching, and a white rubber sole, showing signs of regular wear. The design is simple and classic, with no visible branding.
description_view_0: Front view showing the rounded toe, white laces, and the white rubber sole with a black stripe.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the low-top profile, white stitching, and the flat sole.
description_view_2: Angled front view displaying the lacing system, toe creasing, and overall worn appearance.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the same low-top silhouette and stitching details as the other side.
